data.title: Shaw: I am very much looking forward to v2 and will release an updated roadmap soon
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Shaw, the founder of ElizaOS (formerly ai16z), posted on X that the first phase of ElizaOS distribution has been opened to ai16z holders and ecosystem members. He is very much looking forward to version v2 and will release an updated roadmap soon.

data.title: MyShell announces three major updates: ShellAgent protocol, IM integration, and on-chain intelligence
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News MyShell launched three major updates to its self-developed open source ShellAgent framework after IDO, comprehensively improving the AI ​​Agent development experience and promoting cross-industry applications: ShellAgent protocol, comprehensive IM integration and on-chain intelligence. These updates will simplify the development process, enhance user experience and expand application scenarios.
The ShellAgent protocol enables code-free, visual creation of AI Agents, and further opens up the plug-in ecosystem, allowing developers to easily build, upload and share AI Agent plug-ins to promote cross-industry cooperation. The ShellAgent plug-in library has expanded from 300 to almost unlimited, providing contribution space for developers in fields such as medical and legal fields. Through IM integration, MyShell's AI Agent can be automatically deployed on platforms such as X without writing code, improving user interaction and decision optimization.
In addition, ShellAgent introduces on-chain intelligence, which simplifies asset management and promotes innovation and scalability of decentralized applications by integrating modular wallets, multi-chain support and artificial general intelligence (AGI). These updates mark the further development of MyShell in a decentralized and intelligent ecosystem, helping developers build cross-industry automation applications and promote an AI-driven future.
MyShell's official token SHELL is currently priced at $0.5 and has risen to $0.59.

data.title: The largest whale on the SHELL personal holdings list has made a profit of more than $400,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the top whale address in the SHELL personal holding list has made a floating profit of $414,000 in three days, with a return rate of 55.6%.
It has bought 2.09 million SHELLs at an average price of $0.3628 since February 14, spending a total of $745,000, and has not sold any SHELLs during this period.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Trump: Someone tried to separate me and Musk but "failed"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fox News Channel released an interview video with Trump and Musk on February 14th local time. In the video, the host asked Trump if he knew that some American media tried to sow discord by saying "President Musk". Trump said that he was not surprised by this situation. Some people wanted to separate him and Musk and spread many similar rumors, but they did not succeed, because if these media were good at discrediting him, he would not be able to be successfully elected as the President of the United States. Musk, who was sitting next to Trump, nodded frequently and agreed with what Trump said. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Hive Digital Reports Significant Increase In Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to PANews, Hive Digital, a Nasdaq-listed company, released its performance report for the year ending December 31, 2024. Executive Chairman Frank Holmes announced that the company mined 1,770 BTC in 2024. By the end of the year, Hive Digital reached a new high in Bitcoin holdings, possessing 2,805 BTC valued at over $260 million. This marks a 263% increase compared to the $72 million in Bitcoin recorded on the balance sheet at the end of December 2023.
